profile.name: GRIMA Florian
profile.summary: I design and ship machine learning systems that stay useful after the demo: production pipelines, applied research, MLOps foundations, and product-facing AI experiences.

hero.title: Where dreams rise through the silence.
hero.description: I build machine learning products for deep thinkers, bold creators, and quiet rebels. From experimentation to deployment, I focus on systems that are sharp, reliable, and made to last.

studies.title: Master's Degree in Software Engineering
studies.description: Advanced coursework in software engineering, data engineering, and optimization, with a strong focus on turning theoretical models into practical systems.

studies.title: Software Engineering
studies.description: Year abroad in Canada, focused on software engineering and AI.

careers.title: Teaching Assistant
careers.description: Assisted students with software engineering and AI concepts, providing guidance on projects and helping them develop their technical skills.

careers.title: Freelance - Design and Backend Engineering
careers.description: Designed and developed a mobile application for Bulltribe, a company based in Marseille, France. The application was built using Flutter and Node.js in Typescript, and it was used to manage and track projects, tasks, and team members.

careers.title: Fullstack Engineer
careers.description: I worked on the Gamercraft platform, a website to earn money and prizes through competitive gaming. I was responsible for the development of the platform, including the frontend, backend and data science.

projects.name: Energizer
projects.description: Energizer is a ML library optimized for Mac M-series chips.

projects.name: Sirius
projects.description: Sirius is a Life simulator using AI prediction

projects.name: LibrOpen
projects.description: LibrOpen is a open source website to share and explore open source projects. It's the final year project.

projects.name: R-Type
projects.description: R-Type is a 2D side-scrolling shooter multiplayer game developed using C++ and SFML.
